column7: Boosts tiller count and leaf area index; increases grain protein; apply at transplanting and 40 DAT.
Provides balanced NPK at establishment; promotes strong root system and early canopy development.
Provides N + S for grain protein; slight soil acidification improves nutrient availability in alkaline fields.
Strengthens culm and reduces lodging; improves blast and BLB disease resistance significantly.
Brassinosteroids boost hybrid's stem elongation and pollen viability; foliar application at tillering and PI improves filled spikelet ratio.
Nano-scale nutrients penetrate leaf cuticle rapidly; algae and bacteria components enrich rhizosphere for improved hybrid rooting.
Root exudate compounds activate beneficial rhizobacteria; improves nutrient solubilization near hybrid roots for better N and P uptake.
Fixes 20–30 kg N/ha when flooded; organic N released slowly matches hybrid's vegetative growth demand, reducing urea requirement.
Water-soluble NPK absorbed directly through leaves; foliar application at PI stage rapidly corrects mid-season nutrient deficiency in hybrid.
